steps.title: Match the evolving timeline
steps.content: The clause as nanotechnology evolves describes an ongoing process extending forward. The main verb should express what medical technology is expected to do during that continuing development.

steps.title: Reject past-tense mismatches
steps.content:
• Choice A uses past perfect progressive, placing the action before a past reference point.
  • Choice C uses a conditional perfect form, suggesting an unreal past condition.
  • Choice D uses past perfect, which also conflicts with the present and future sense of evolves.
The answer is B.
